response.justification: Bogdan has substantial full-stack experience and recent work with AI-agent infrastructure, including MCP and developer tooling, which aligns well with GenAI and cloud requirements. However, his resume lacks explicit mention of production-grade AI solutions, vector databases, RAG architectures, or multi-agent systems. His background is more general software engineering with some AI-adjacent tools, but not the specialized GenAI expertise sought for this role.
strengths: Strong full-stack engineering background with TypeScript, Python, and cloud experience (AWS CDK)
Recent work with AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP) code generators
Demonstrated leadership in technical tooling and open-source contributions
concerns: No explicit experience with vector databases, RAG architectures, or multi-agent systems
Resume lacks clear examples of production-grade AI solutions or GenAI system design
Limited evidence of leading technical discovery sessions or customer-facing technical leadership
